app.title: CSP Builder
app.tagline: Free online generator to turn Windows ADMX/ADML templates and the Microsoft Policy CSP catalog into ready-to-ship SyncML payloads for <fleet>FleetDM</fleet>, <intune>Intune</intune>, and any MDM that speaks OMA-DM. Built by <primo>Primo</primo> — the IT platform for modern teams (device management, onboarding, SaaS, procurement).

promo.heading: Shipping GPO / CSP policies at scale?
promo.body: This builder handles the payload. Primo handles the rest: enroll devices via MDM, push ADMX-backed and native CSP policies, manage macOS, Windows, Linux and iOS fleets from one place, and automate onboarding/offboarding with your HR system.

nativeCsp.name: Native Windows Policy CSP
nativeCsp.description: Microsoft DDFv2 Feb 2026 catalog + ADMX-backed element schemas. No upload required.

dropZone.or: or click to browse. Pairs are matched by filename.

policyList.title: Policies
policyList.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, category or description…

policyEditor.emptyDescription: Select a policy from the list (ADMX or native CSP) to configure it.

admxEditor.applyOff: Apply is off — this policy is not emitted in the SyncML payload. Flip the toggle, or change any setting above, to include it.

pathParameters.title: Path parameters
pathParameters.hint: Microsoft DDF marks this CSP as parameterised — fill the name of each instance so the LocURI is complete.
pathParameters.missingWarning: ⚠ At least one name is empty — the generated URI will contain // and Windows will reject it.

cspEditor.stateHelp: Not Configured emits a <Delete>, Enabled an <enabled/> payload with the elements below, Disabled a <disabled/> marker.
cspEditor.applyOff: Apply is off — this CSP is not emitted in the SyncML payload. Flip the toggle, or change the value above, to include it.

admxBacked.title: ADMX-backed CSP — special payload required
admxBacked.intro: Unlike regular CSPs, this setting expects an ADMX-style XML payload inside , not a raw value. Structure:
admxBacked.elementHint: Element id names come from the underlying ADMX file (e.g. WallpaperName, WallpaperStyle for Desktop/Wallpaper).
admxBacked.learnMore: Check Microsoft Learn for this area →
admxBacked.payloadHelp: Will be XML-escaped into <Data>…</Data> on export. Line breaks are preserved.

exportPanel.title: Export
exportPanel.summary: {{admx}} ADMX · {{csp}} CSP · {{reset}} reset · {{files}} ADMX files loaded
exportPanel.resetConfirmOne: Reset the 1 applied policy? This clears its state and value. The ADMX templates stay loaded.
exportPanel.resetConfirmMany: Reset {{count}} applied policies? This clears their state and values. The ADMX templates stay loaded.

fleetdm.label: FleetDM compatible
fleetdm.description: Raw top-level <Replace>/<Delete> commands — policy ops only, no envelope, no inline ADMX ingestion. Ingest custom ADMX through a separate FleetDM profile before applying.

envelopeWithIngestion.label: ADMX Ingestion + Full SyncML envelope
envelopeWithIngestion.description: Full <SyncML> + <SyncHdr> + <SyncBody>, ADMX ingested inline, policy commands inside, closing <Final/>.

bodyWithIngestion.label: ADMX Ingestion (SyncBody only)
bodyWithIngestion.description: <SyncBody> fragment with ADMX ingestion and policy commands. No outer <SyncML>/<SyncHdr>.

envelopeOnly.label: Full SyncML envelope (no ingestion)
envelopeOnly.description: Full <SyncML> envelope, but skip the ADMX ingestion <Replace>. Useful when the ADMX is already uploaded on the target.

bodyOnly.label: SyncBody only (no ingestion)
bodyOnly.description: Just a <SyncBody> fragment with policy commands, nothing else.
